title: Tactical Happy Ghast Warfare
description: Launch TNT from your happy ghast with a little help from a villager
body:
# Tactical Happy Ghast Warfare

This mod allows you to use flint and steel on happy ghasts to drop TNT from a leashed chest boat ridden by a villager and filled with TNT. The TNT will get consumed from the chest and flint and steel will take durability damage for each TNT dropped.

The mod also adds an advancement obtained by killing a certain mob with a TNT launched from a happy ghast, and an unique death message for players who die in the same manner.

Fabric version requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). NeoForge version has no requirements.

![gif](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOGxuYjV4YTEwZTh6MHNvbm8yeGUwbGVpeGpvbGk2NWVqaGF2YmU3YiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Ysm5V0QOt2QLgr6Nyw/giphy.gif)
